stat_block.text: A large, stylized symbol of an eye adorns the top of this wooden staff, representing the watchful eye of the divine powers. The bearer of the staff can guide and protect, seeing bounties and tragedies that could befall them in the future. When wielding this staff, you gain a +1 item bonus to Survival checks to Sense Direction or Subsist and to Religion checks to Recall Knowledge.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

stat_block.craft_requirements: Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.

variants.name: Staff of Providence
variants.text:
* Cantrip guidance
* 1st bless , create water
* 2nd augury , create food , see the unseen , status

variants.name: Staff of Providence (Greater)
variants.text:
* 3rd safe passage , wanderer's guide
* 4th cleanse affliction , dispelling globe , status

variants.name: Staff of Providence (Major)
variants.text:
* 5th dispelling globe , scouting eye , see the unseen
* 6th dispelling globe , scintillating safeguard , truesight

variants.name: Staff of Providence (True)
variants.text:
* 7th dispelling globe , energy aegis
* 8th dispelling globe , divine inspiration
* 9th dispelling globe , foresight , overwhelming presence
